rdf:Description.dc:description: G_max/G stiffness-scaling sensitivity study across the Hardin 1978 band [2, 5]. (a) Baseline f_1 (left y) and % drop at S/D = 0.5 (right y) vs scaling factor — both scale with the factor. (b) Power-law scour exponent b vs scaling factor, with a ±5% decision band shaded around the used value — b stays flat across the range, showing the scour-sensitivity conclusion is insensitive to the stiffness calibration choice.
